overrideJustification: Same as fork-setup: forked Uniswap app tests (277) fail due to missing @universe/gating in test setup. Legacy web/ typecheck fails with React types. Core packages (api 159 tests, sdk 33 tests, scripts 7 tests) all pass. Visual verification via agent-browser confirms CASH TDP renders correctly with data from our API. User explicitly requested no validation overhead.

test.note: Core packages pass; forked app tests not configured

typecheck.note: Core packages pass; web/ has pre-existing React type issue
